fre-headline: Schedule secure OpenTalk video meetings from Outlook
fre-description: Add an OpenTalk meeting link to any appointment and manage guest access and invitees right from your calendar.
fre-account-hint: Sign in with your OpenTalk account to get started. An active OpenTalk account is required.
error-boundary-message: Something went wrong while loading the OpenTalk add-in.
